meaning: 纽马克特[英国英格兰东南部城镇](著名的赛马中心)
examples: Are you going to race your horse at Newmarket next week?
Captain Mike and I met at Newmarket car pool parking lot at 7:25am.
The going (ie The surface of the race -track) at Newmarket is soft today.
All four horses were put through their paces in a workout at Newmarket on Tuesday morning.
Newmarket's "Whale Rider, " for instance, peaked at just over 550 screens this past summer.
